error_map.hint: google-ads access_token is missing, expired, or invalid; re-run pm credentials add google-ads
google-ads developer_token/account lacks access for this request
google-ads rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (resourceNames is a bare JSON array of scalar strings, not objects -- connsdk.RecordsAt silently drops non-object array elements, yielding zero records via the declarative path); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/google-ads/hooks_test.go

StreamHook-handled (GAQL search is a POST whose JSON body carries query/pageSize/pageToken, and whose pageToken pagination state lives INSIDE that body -- StreamSpec.Body is declared but never read by engine/read.go's declarative path, which always sends a nil body); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/google-ads/hooks_test.go
